findings.title: Release workflow uses non-existent GitHub Action versions
findings.description: `.github/workflows/windows-release.yml` references `actions/checkout@v6` and `actions/setup-node@v6`. The latest published major version for both actions is v4. This will cause the release workflow to fail immediately.

findings.title: Failing test: desktopBridge web fallback lacks indexedDB mock
findings.description: `src/services/desktopBridge.test.ts` fails with `ReferenceError: indexedDB is not defined` because `desktopApiKey.isConfigured()` indirectly calls `storageService.getItems()`, which opens an IndexedDB via `idb`. The test environment (jsdom) does not provide `indexedDB`, and `fake-indexeddb` is not initialized in this test file.

findings.title: No ESLint or Prettier configuration
findings.description: The project enforces TypeScript strict mode but has no linting (ESLint) or formatting (Prettier) setup. This increases risk of style drift, missing unused variables, and undetected code smells.
findings.evidence: No .eslintrc, eslint.config, .prettierrc, or prettier.config files found.

findings.title: No test coverage reporting
findings.description: Vitest runs tests but coverage is not configured. There is no `--coverage` flag in package.json scripts and no `@vitest/coverage-v8` dependency.
findings.evidence: package.json scripts; no coverage dependency in devDependencies.

findings.title: No CodeQL security analysis workflow
findings.description: RUP Protocol recommends CodeQL for JavaScript/TypeScript repositories to detect security vulnerabilities. The repo has no `.github/workflows/codeql.yml`.

findings.title: No dependency review or lockfile integrity check in CI
findings.description: CI does not run `npm ci --audit` or verify that `package-lock.json` is in sync with `package.json`. A drift between the two could lead to reproducibility issues.
findings.evidence: ci.yml runs `npm ci` without `--audit` or lockfile verification.

findings.title: No pre-commit hooks or git hooks configured
findings.description: No husky, lint-staged, or similar tooling to enforce typecheck/tests before commit.
findings.evidence: No .husky/ directory or git hooks beyond default templates.

findings.title: TODO.md contains stale 'Open' items without target dates
findings.description: Several P1/P2 items in TODO.md are marked 'Open' but have no milestone or target date, making it hard to track public readiness progress.

strengths: Comprehensive documentation (README, AGENTS.md, ABOUT, SECURITY, LEGAL, RELEASE, REPOSITORY_TREE)
TypeScript strict mode enforced across renderer and Electron main
Well-structured Electron IPC validation and secure storage
Dependabot configured for npm and GitHub Actions
CODEOWNERS with explicit security-critical file assignments
